title: The text in Monday documents is not fully visible when it is converted into an item for a board.
excerpt: In Monday Docs, when working with long text and converting it into an item for a board, the full content is not displayed after the conversion. Instead, the text is truncated, showing only a few words. This limitation is…

posts.author: CarlosVeliz (Carlos)
posts.cookedHtml: In Monday Docs, when working with long text and converting it into an item for a board, the full content is not displayed after the conversion. Instead, the text is truncated, showing only a few words. This limitation is particularly frustrating as it prevents users from viewing or accessing the complete information directly in the Monday Doc, creating inefficiencies and potential miscommunication. Having the full text readily visible is crucial for ensuring clarity and maintaining productivity within workflows.
